name: Robert Ryan
abstract: Robert Bushnell Ryan (November 11, 1909 – July 11, 1973) was an American actor and activist. He became known for his roles in films noir and Westerns, gaining fame for his portrayals of both hardened anti-heroes and ruthless villains.

about_quotes.speaker: Percy Heath
about_quotes.evidence: Robert Ryan, being a Southern prejudiced individual, didn’t wanna trust the black participant, Harry Belafonte
about_quotes.doc_title: Percy Heath — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
